  "findings": [
    "Voltage glove class is incorrect for the exposure level",
    "Voltage gloves are overdue for periodic dielectric testing"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Remove the non-compliant voltage gloves from service",
    "Procure and issue correctly rated, currently certified dielectric gloves",
    "Verify the testing date stamp on the replacement gloves before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Using voltage gloves of the incorrect class or those that are overdue for testing exposes the worker to immediate, life-threatening electrical shock and arc flash hazards. Under NFPA 70E and OSHA 1910.137, electrical protective equipment must be rated for the voltage encountered and tested at least every 6 months.",

    "NFPA 70E Article 130",
    "OSHA 1910.137",
    "OSHA 1910.335"
  ]
